schedulingInsights.title: Scheduling Insights
schedulingInsights.subtitle: AI-powered analysis to optimize therapist utilization and reduce scheduling gaps
schedulingInsights.heatmapDesc: Appointment density by day of week and time of day. Darker cells indicate higher utilization.
schedulingInsights.noData: No scheduling data found for this period.
schedulingInsights.insightsDesc: Data-driven recommendations to optimize your practice schedule.
schedulingInsights.clickAnalyze: Click "Analyze Schedule" to generate AI-powered insights about your scheduling patterns.
schedulingInsights.slotsDesc: Optimal times for scheduling a new 50-minute appointment. Slots that fill gaps score higher.
schedulingInsights.noSlots: No optimal slots found. The therapist may have a fully booked schedule.
schedulingInsights.utilizationDesc: Select a therapist above for detailed analysis and optimal slot suggestions.

therapistProductivity.title: Therapist Productivity
therapistProductivity.subtitle: Track per-therapist metrics, utilization, and revenue performance
therapistProductivity.comparisonDesc: Click column headers to sort. Metrics based on selected date range.
therapistProductivity.noData: No therapist data found for the selected period.

common.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.

dashboard.practiceOverview: Here's what's happening with your practice today.
dashboard.commonTasks: Common tasks to get you started
dashboard.noClaimsDescription: Claims track your billing activity. Create a claim after a patient session to start billing insurance or tracking payments.
dashboard.noPatientDescription: Add your first patient to begin managing their information, verifying insurance eligibility, and tracking sessions.
dashboard.loggedOut: You are logged out. Logging in again...

portal.accountOverview: Here's an overview of your account
portal.name: Name
portal.loggedOutDesc: You have been successfully logged out.
portal.healthInfoSecure: Your health information is protected and secure.
portal.needHelp: Need help? Contact your healthcare provider.
portal.loginSubtitle: Access your appointments, profile, and more
portal.emailHint: Enter the email address associated with your patient record
portal.secureLogin: We'll send you a secure, one-time login link. No password needed.
portal.linkExpired: Login links expire after 15 minutes for your security. Please request a new one below.
portal.loginLinkSentTo: We've sent a secure login link to
portal.emailArriveMinutes: The email should arrive within a few minutes
portal.clickLink: Click the link in the email to log in
portal.checkSpam: Check your spam folder if you don't see it
portal.checkEmailForLink: Check your email for the login link. It will expire in 15 minutes.
portal.viewAppointments: View your appointments and request new ones
portal.completeToSchedule: Complete the following to schedule appointments:
portal.completeIntake: Complete your patient intake form (profile information)
portal.addPaymentMethod: Add a payment method on file
portal.updateProfileReqs: Please update your profile to complete these requirements.
portal.staffReview: Our staff will review and confirm your request soon.
portal.trackRequests: Track the status of your appointment requests
portal.requestDialogDesc: Submit a request for a new appointment. Our staff will review and confirm your request.
portal.selectTypeDateTime: Please select an appointment type, date, and time.
portal.requestSubmittedDesc: Your appointment request has been submitted for approval.
portal.requestCancelledDesc: Your appointment request has been cancelled.
portal.insuranceBillingDesc: Your health insurance details for billing purposes
portal.infoSecureDesc: Insurance information is encrypted and used only for billing purposes. We never share your data with third parties without your consent.
portal.paymentRequired: A payment method on file is required to schedule appointments
portal.contactOffice: Please contact the office to add a payment method to your account. This is required before you can schedule appointments.
portal.profileUpdatedDesc: Your information has been saved successfully.
portal.progressNotesDesc: Summaries from your therapy sessions shared by your therapist
portal.noProgressNotesDesc: Your therapist will share session summaries here after your appointments. Check back after your next session.
portal.progressNotesPrivacy: These notes are summaries prepared by your therapist specifically for you. They reflect selected highlights from your sessions.

surveys.title: Surveys
surveys.subtitle: Complete assigned assessments and view your history
surveys.noSurveysDesc: Your therapist hasn't assigned any surveys yet. Check back later.
surveys.overPastWeeks: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?
surveys.submittedWithScore: Thank you! Your score has been recorded.
surveys.submittedSuccess: Thank you for completing the survey.
surveys.submitFailed: Failed to submit survey. Please try again.

progressNotes.title: Patient Progress Notes
progressNotes.description: Create patient-friendly session summaries to share with patients via their portal
progressNotes.createDesc: Write a patient-friendly summary of this session. This is separate from your clinical SOAP note.
progressNotes.autoGenerateDesc: Use AI to create a patient-friendly summary from the clinical note
progressNotes.summaryPlaceholder: Write a warm, patient-friendly summary of what was covered in this session...
progressNotes.goalsPlaceholder: Fine motor skills, Sensory regulation, Self-care independence
progressNotes.homeworkPlaceholder: Activities or exercises for the patient to practice at home...
progressNotes.nextFocusPlaceholder: What will be the focus of the next session...
progressNotes.noNotes: No progress notes created yet for this patient
progressNotes.patientPreviewDesc: This is how the patient will see this note in their portal
progressNotes.currentlyShared: This note is currently visible to the patient
progressNotes.notSharedYet: This note has not been shared with the patient yet
progressNotes.createdDesc: The progress note has been created. Share it when ready for the patient to see.
progressNotes.sharedDesc: The patient can now see this note in their portal
progressNotes.unsharedDesc: This note is no longer visible to the patient

locations.title: Locations
locations.subtitle: Manage your practice locations and staff assignments
locations.addLocationDesc: Add a new office location for your practice
locations.editLocationDesc: Update the details for this location
locations.noLocationsDesc: Add your practice locations to manage staff assignments and filter data by office.
locations.addStaffDesc: Assign a team member to work at this location
locations.setPrimaryLocation: Set as primary location for this user
locations.noStaffAssigned: No staff assigned to this location yet.
locations.createdDesc: The new location has been added successfully.
locations.staffAssignedDesc: Team member has been assigned to this location.
locations.staffRemovedDesc: Team member has been removed from this location.

reportBuilder.title: Report Builder
reportBuilder.subtitle: Generate custom reports on claims, revenue, patients, and more.
reportBuilder.buildDescription: Select report type, date range, and grouping to generate your report.
reportBuilder.saveReportDescription: Save this report so you can quickly run it again later.
reportBuilder.reportDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of what this report tracks
reportBuilder.exportDescription: Your CSV file is being downloaded.
reportBuilder.noSavedReports: No saved reports yet. Generate and save a report to see it here.
reportBuilder.savedDescription: Your report configuration has been saved.
reportBuilder.deletedDescription: The saved report has been removed.
reportBuilder.loggedOut: You are logged out. Logging in again...
reportBuilder.noDataDescription: No records match the selected filters and date range.
reportBuilder.getStartedDescription: Configure the report type, date range, and filters above, then click Generate Report to see your data.
reportBuilder.showingFirst: Showing first {{count}} of {{total}} rows. Export CSV for full data.

aiInsights.title: AI Insights
aiInsights.subtitle: Continuous learning from claim outcomes to improve predictions and optimize billing
aiInsights.generateError: Failed to generate insights. Please try again.
aiInsights.noInsightsDescription: As claims are processed (paid or denied), the AI learns from outcomes to identify patterns, underpayments, and optimization opportunities. Generate insights once you have claim outcome data.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's get your practice set up in just a few minutes. We'll walk you through the essential steps to start managing your billing.
onboarding.practiceInfoDesc: Enter your practice details for claims and billing.
onboarding.addressPlaceholder: 123 Main St, Suite 100, City, State ZIP
onboarding.therapistDesc: Invite a therapist to join your practice, or skip if you are the sole provider.
onboarding.credentialsPlaceholder: e.g., OTR/L, PT, DPT, MS, CCC-SLP
onboarding.therapistInvitedDesc: An invitation email has been sent.
onboarding.patientDesc: Add a patient to get started with scheduling and billing.
onboarding.patientAddedDesc: Your first patient has been added successfully.
onboarding.readyDesc: Your practice is ready to go. Here's a summary of your setup progress.

dataExport.title: Data Export
dataExport.subtitle: Export your practice data for compliance, migration, or backup purposes. All exports are filtered to your practice only.

dateRange.title: Date Range Filter
dateRange.description: Optionally filter exports by date range. Leave blank to export all records.

patients.title: Patients
patients.description: Export all patient records including demographics, insurance information, and contact details.

claims.title: Claims
claims.description: Export all claims with line items, amounts, statuses, and submission history.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Export appointment history including scheduling, cancellations, and recurring series.

statements.title: Patient Statements
statements.description: Export patient billing statements including amounts, payment status, and delivery tracking.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: Export the compliance audit trail including all access events and data changes.

fullBackup.title: Complete Practice Backup
fullBackup.description: Generate a comprehensive JSON backup containing all practice data.
fullBackup.warning: Full backups may be large and take time to generate depending on your data volume. The file will contain all patient PHI and should be stored securely.

dataExport.exportErrorDescription: An error occurred while generating the export. Please try again.

waitlist.title: Waitlist Management
waitlist.subtitle: Smart waitlist with auto-fill for cancelled slots
waitlist.addDialogDesc: Add a patient who wants an earlier or different appointment slot
waitlist.notifyDialogDesc: Send an email/SMS about an available appointment slot
waitlist.removeConfirm: Remove this patient from the waitlist?

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.subtitle: Control how and when you receive notifications.
notifications.channelsDesc: Choose how you want to receive notifications.
notifications.typesDesc: Select which types of notifications you want to receive.
notifications.surveyRemindersDesc: Reminders to complete assessments and surveys
notifications.quietHoursDesc: Set hours when notifications will be deferred. Leave empty to disable.
notifications.quietHoursActive: Notifications will be deferred between {{start}} and {{end}}.
notifications.savedDesc: Your notification preferences have been updated.
